creator: steven.hartland@multiplay.co.uk
text:
Port for Linux Fedora Core 9 based off the existing Fedora Core 8 port.

This port provides the ability to run Valves Left 4 Dead game which
requires glibc 2.8 not present in Fedora Core 8 by default. It requires
linux version 2.6.16 set via sysctl

Fix: 

Commit http://clanservers.multiplay.co.uk/dropzone/linux_base-f9.tar.gz
